appInstall.subtitle: Event & Protocol Automation Platform
appInstall.feature1Desc: Launch instantly with one tap from your home screen
appInstall.feature2Desc: Receive real-time alerts for schedule changes and check-ins
appInstall.feature3Desc: Use basic features without internet connection
appInstall.feature4Desc: Clean app-like experience without browser address bar
appInstall.androidStep1: Open this page in Chrome browser
appInstall.androidStep1Desc: App installation is only available in Chrome browser.
appInstall.androidStep2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top right
appInstall.androidStep2Hint: Three dots menu in Chrome top right
appInstall.androidStep3: Select 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen'
appInstall.androidStep3Hint: Choose 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen' from menu
appInstall.androidDoneDesc: Alpha Trip icon will be added to your home screen. Tap it to use like an app!
appInstall.iosStep1: Open this page in Safari browser
appInstall.iosStep1Desc: Adding to home screen is only available in Safari. Not supported in Chrome or other browsers.
appInstall.iosStep2: Tap the Share button at the bottom
appInstall.iosStep2Hint: Share icon in Safari bottom bar (square with upward arrow)
appInstall.iosStep3Hint: Scroll down in share menu to find 'Add to Home Screen'
appInstall.iosStep4Desc: Confirm the app name and tap the 'Add' button.
appInstall.iosDoneDesc: Alpha Trip icon will be added to your home screen. Tap it to use like an app!
appInstall.desktopStep1: Open this page in Chrome or Edge browser
appInstall.desktopStep2: Click the install icon on the right side of the address bar
appInstall.desktopStep2Hint: A monitor+arrow icon appears on the right side of the address bar
appInstall.desktopStep3Desc: Click 'Install' in the popup to install as a desktop app.
appInstall.desktopDoneDesc: You can launch Alpha Trip from your desktop or app list.
appInstall.faq1Q: Is this different from downloading from the app store?
appInstall.faq1A: Alpha Trip is a PWA (Progressive Web App) that can be installed directly from your web browser without an app store. It provides the same experience as a native app while using less storage space.
appInstall.faq2A: Just like any app, long-press the icon to delete, or remove it from Settings > Apps.
appInstall.faq3Q: Does it use a lot of data?
appInstall.faq3A: Initial installation uses only about 5MB of data. After that, cached data enables fast loading.
